Interface ISQLSyntaxInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the SQL Syntax Info Interface.

[Guid("0A5F737C-5707-4AEE-BD01-023C4FE1673C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISQLSyntaxInfo

Properties

DelimitedIdentifierCase

Indicates whether DBMS's quoted identifiers are case sensitive.

bool DelimitedIdentifierCase { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DBMS dependent SQL function names.

IPropertySet FunctionNames { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

IdentifierCase

Indicates whether DBMS's identifiers are case sensitive.

bool IdentifierCase { get; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

InvalidCharacters

The list of invalid characters used in literals (if any).

string InvalidCharacters { get; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

InvalidStartingCharacters

The list of invalid starting characters used in literals (if any).

string InvalidStartingCharacters { get; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

Keywords

The list of DBMS specific reserved keywords.

IStringArray

Special DBMS dependent SQL characters.

IPropertySet

StringComparisonCase

Indicates whether string comparisons are case sensitive.

bool
